message:
feat(export): accurate message-type breakdown in HTML export metadata

Replaces the misleading "577 messages" count with a precise breakdown:
human prompts, assistant responses, and tool use invocations.

Template metadata (template.rs):
- Renamed human_turns field label to "prompts" for clarity
- Split tool_calls into assistant_msgs (response count) and
  tool_use_count (individual tool_use blocks in assistant messages)
- Header now renders "19 prompts, 38 responses, 284 tool uses"
  instead of "19 turns, 284 tool calls"

Export logic (lib.rs):
- Counting now operates on raw_messages instead of processed Messages
  for accuracy. Distinguishes human-typed prompts from tool results
  (both have role "user") by checking for tool_result content blocks.
- Counts assistant messages and individual tool_use blocks separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
